eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Piute, UT; at 11:58 AM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 11:58 AM JUN 29, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Piute CO Sheriff/EM- Cottonwood Fire Towns of Marysvale, Junction and Circleville in READY Status. READY status means a wildfire is active in the area and conditions could change. This means you should prepare now so you can leave quickly if the situation worsens. Gather medications, documents, and a go-kit. Ready your family, pets, and vehicle to leave quickly. Monitor your phone, local TV, and radio for updates. If you feel unsafe, you can leave at any time.
